calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2006 Continued To Sep-13-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-26-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
